title: Assist with planned burning
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with planned burning demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assist with preparations for the burn

pcs.text: Prepare machinery and equipment required for burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare machinery and equipment required for burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare machinery and equipment required for burn.

pcs.text: Check and prepare safety equipment and personal protective equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret instructions for planned burn and contingencies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Raise problems or concerns during the burn with supervisor.

pcs.text: Observe changes in conditions at fire, and report effect on fire behaviour and development to burn supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe changes in conditions at fire, and report effect on fire behaviour and development to burn supervisor.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
